name: Fudgy Fructose Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, mix together the fructose, skim milk, and cornstarch until the starch is dissolved.
2. Add the broken pieces of unsweetened chocolate to the saucepan and cook over medium heat until the chocolate melts and the mixture thickens and bubbles.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in the vanilla extract and margarine until the frosting is creamy.
4. Spread the frosting over one 8-inch or 9-inch round or square layer cake, or use it to frost 10 cupcakes.
5. One serving of this frosting contains approximately 65 calories or 1 fruit plus 1/2 fat exchange.
